alone-in-empty-grave.title: Alone in an Empty Grave
alone-in-empty-grave.credit: Written by Anthony and sang by Suno
alone-in-empty-grave.lyrics:
With my shaking hand and the daylight getting thin
I'm writing these words down before the dark moves in
The farm outside is still and the house feels too big
I built it all for you, now I'm the only one here living in it
I knew the sickness was moving in slow
But I stayed quiet, tried to carry it on my own
Didn't want to be a burden, didn't want you to see
Now I'm writing this knowing you might never read it from me

You're out there living the lives I pushed you toward
Degrees on the wall in a world far away
I was so proud when you left with your dreams in your hands
Now I'd give it all just to have you back on our land
I missed my grandson's first steps, his first words
Missed his birthday, the scraped knees, the hurt
I told you go, chase your dreams, be free
Now a dream is all that's left of me

All this land, all this house, all this sweat and years
Built it strong so you'd never have my fears
But you don't feel it, you won't carry it on
You'll sell it off when I'm finally gone
I wish I'd said stay, I wish I'd said please
I wish I'd told you what really matters to me
The American dream took more than it gave
Left me here alone in an empty grave

I remember the dinners, the noise around our table
The way you used to run to me when you were able
Even the nights you pushed every button I had
I'd trade every quiet hour for one more like that
My little girl's raising your son on your own now
I hear the tired in your voice when you call on the phone
My boy, you got the corner office with your brand-new wife
But I feel the tension when you step into my life

When your mama passed you stood right here and fought
Over who was gonna have to take care of me and what it would cost
I sat here quiet while you decided what to do with your dad
Like I was something you inherited instead of the man who raised you
I taught you how to drive, I picked you up when you fell
I worked myself raw so you'd never have to know that hell
Now I'm the burden you don't have time for
The very thing I taught you never to become

The nurse made the call while I couldn't speak
You told her you'll fly out after work to see me
I lost my voice and now I'm out of time
God if You're listening, just give me one more try
I'll give it all back, every dollar, everything
Just to hold you again, just to tell you I failed
I pushed you away for the things I could hold
Now I'm holding nothing and I feel so damn cold

All this land, all this house, all this sweat and years
Built it strong so you'd never have my fears
But you don't feel it, you won't carry it on
You'll sell it off when I'm finally gone
I wish I'd said stay, I wish I'd said please
I wish I'd told you what really matters to me
The American dream took more than it gave
Left me here alone in an empty grave

I'm weary now
My hand shakes
I was wrong
I'm sorry
I was wrong

lost.title: Lost
lost.credit: Written by Anthony and sang by Suno
